/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_checksum.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_checksum.dir/test_checksum_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_checksum.dir/test_checksum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_checksum.dir/src/crypto/MnemonicEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_checksum.dir/src/crypto/PostQuantumCrypto.cpp.o -o test_checksum  -Wl,-rpath,/home/user/Qt/6.10.0/gcc_64/lib:/usr/local/lib /home/user/Qt/6.10.0/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/local/lib/liboqs.so
